summary: The diff modifies frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts and frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx to address the admin permissions error. useQueries.ts now gates queries on !!actor && !isFetching && !!identity && extraEnabled, and AdminPanel.tsx passes an enabled flag to the hooks. This covers part of REQ-2 (disabling queries until authenticated actor is ready). However, there is no evidence of query invalidation/refetch when the actor transitions from anonymous to authenticated (a REQ-2 AC), and no actor-reconstruction logic is shown to ensure the actor carries the logged-in principal (a REQ-1 AC).

missing_requirements.requirement: The authenticated actor used for admin queries carries the logged-in Internet Identity principal, not an anonymous principal.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff only gates queries on !!identity but does not show any mechanism that reconstructs or swaps the actor to use the authenticated identity principal before making backend calls. There is no evidence that the actor passed to getAllBookings/getAllRegistrations carries the authenticated principal rather than the anonymous one.

missing_requirements.requirement: Invalidate/refetch admin queries when the actor transitions from anonymous to authenticated.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff gates queries using the enabled flag but does not show any useEffect or queryClient.invalidateQueries call that explicitly triggers a refetch when the actor transitions from anonymous to authenticated. No automatic re-trigger mechanism is visible beyond the enabled flag becoming true.
